plugins.description: Generate a QR code image from text content and return as base64 PNG

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The text content to encode into QR code

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: QR code image size in pixels (default 300)

plugins.description: Query real-time weather for a city. Returns temperature, weather condition, humidity, wind speed.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City name preferably in English, e.g. Beijing, Tokyo, London, Wuhan. Chinese names like 上海 also supported but English is more reliable.
